calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Oct-29-2025 Off Calendar

DEFAULT HEARING (PROVE UP)
Off Calendar Oct-22-2025 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar being set for plaintiff's request for entry of default judgment.

Judge Dennis Hayashi; Clerk: Damon Carter; Dept. 505
Proceedings recorded by "For the Record" commencing at 9:19am and concluding at 9:27am.

Plaintiff Carmax Auto Superstores appearing represented by marco Domeyer Esq. via zoom.
Defendant Sincere Divine Harris not appearing.

Court addresses Counsel for Plaintiff re: it's request for interest and it's justification for attorney fees. Court determines counsel may file a seperate motion for attorney's fees if they are requesting such.

Counsel for Plaintiff presents summary of case and an offer of proof.

Court examines Witness for Plaintiff Ashley Walker who appeared via zoom and she confirms statements made by counsel.

The matter is submitted.

Based on the documents filed, the statement made by Plaintiff and its Counsel, consideration and good cause appearing, the Court RULES in favor of Plaintiff Carmax Auto Superstores, and against Defendant Sincere Divine Harris as follows:

Damages: $24,014.06
Prejudgment Interest: $0
Attorney Fees: $0
Costs: $500.85
Waiting Time Penalty: $0

TOTAL JUDGMENT: $24,514.91

Proposed judgment signed and filed this date.

DEFAULT HEARING (PROVE UP)
Off Calendar Oct-03-2025 Continued To Oct-22-25 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 505
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar being set for plaintiff's request for entry of default judgment.

Judge Murlene Randle; Clerk: Damon Carter; Dept. 505 - Matter not reported.

Plaintiff Carmax Auto Superstores California, LLC appearing represented by E. Richard Mcguire via zoom.
Defendant Sincere Divine Ha not appearing.

Counsel was informed there are no courtesy copies provide to dept. 505 regarding this matter. this matter is continued to October 22, 2025 at 9:00am in dept. 505 to give counsel an oppertunity to provide copies.
